paragraphs.source: With hybrid bonding, the core circuitry, that is, bitline sense amplifiers (BLSA) and SWD can be placed under the cell array. The goal is for the core circuits to occupy the same area as the cell array to increase overall density.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: With hybrid bonding, the core circuitry, that is, bitline sense amplifiers (BLSA) and SWD can be placed under the cell array. The goal is for the core circuits to occupy the same area as the cell array to increase overall density.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: With hybrid bonding, the core circuitry, that is, bitline sense amplifiers (BLSA) and SWD can be placed under the cell array. The goal is for the core circuits to occupy the same area as the cell array to increase overall density.

pro.text: 借助混合键合技术，核心电路——即位线感测放大器（BLSA）和子字线驱动器（SWD）——得以置于存储单元阵列下方。其目标是让核心电路占据与存储单元阵列相同的面积，从而提高整体密度。

“performance/$”译为“性能/价格比”或“每美元性能”。
“On the otherhand”引导的对比关系需清晰翻译（如“另一方面”）。
将技术细节（SWD重组）与行业洞察（市场激励）结合，翻译时需保持这种深度。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致，且首次出现时未按指南要求加注中文全称。
术语翻译不一致，且首次出现时未按指南要求加注中文全称。
句式略显平行和机械，可以调整得更流畅，以体现原文的对比关系。
‘都是将...堆叠在...之上’的表述略显冗长，可以更简洁。
译文‘对于其他NAND制造商而言确实如此’语气略显中性，未能完全传递原文隐含的对比和轻微质疑意味。
‘重组为16组，每组8个’表述清晰，但‘这使得...’略显翻译腔，可以更直接。
‘这虽然需要...但将...’的转折关系处理得很好。‘每个数据引脚对应的...数量’可以更简洁。
‘核心电路——即位线感测放大器（BLSA）和子字线驱动器（SWD）——’的破折号使用正确，但‘可以放置在’略显被动，可以更主动。
‘这使其能够...，并减少...’的句式稍显冗长。‘不位于任何存储单元下方的’定语较长。
术语翻译不一致。前文译为‘性能/价格比’，此处译为‘性能/价格比（performance/$）’，括号内英文与符号不一致。
‘更受重视’的翻译准确，但‘对于许多应用场景而言，...比单纯追求容量更受重视。’句式可以更精炼，信息密度更高。

paragraphs.source: Samsung adopted the “sandwich” structure, which allows them to maximize the area efficiency of the core circuitry, and reduce the edge region area, which is not under any cells.

pro.text: 三星采用了“三明治”结构，以最大化核心电路的面积效率，并减少未被任何存储单元覆盖的边缘区域面积。

understanding.role_in_article: 探讨DRAM微缩的根本性挑战，并介绍三星4F² COP DRAM作为一种创新解决方案，最后将其置于行业发展和市场需求的宏观背景下评估。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从具体产品（GDDR7）的性能对比，上升到DRAM技术面临的普遍缩放挑战。
understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将过渡到非易失性存储（如NAND Flash，即BiCS10）或其他内存技术，形成从DRAM到其他存储类型的逻辑推进。
key_points: DRAM持续微缩面临挑战。
三星4F² COP DRAM通过重组子字线驱动器（SWD）等创新减少信号数量。
尽管有挑战，混合键合4F² DRAM预计在本十年末、1d节点之后出现。
当前内存市场格局既激励高密度新节点以提高比特产出，也追求高性能/价格比。

paragraphs.source: In traditional DRAM, increasing the number of cells per bitline would result in a significant increase in chip area, while for VCT DRAM, the increase is almost negligible as the core circuitry is all below the cells.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In traditional DRAM, increasing the number of cells per bitline would result in a significant increase in chip area, while for VCT DRAM, the increase is almost negligible as the core circuitry is all below the cells.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In traditional DRAM, increasing the number of cells per bitline would result in a significant increase in chip area, while for VCT DRAM, the increase is almost negligible as the core circuitry is all below the cells.

pro.text: 在传统DRAM中，增加每条位线上的存储单元数量会导致芯片面积显著增加；而对于VCT DRAM，由于核心电路全部位于存储单元下方，这种面积增加几乎可以忽略不计。

understanding.role_in_article: 探讨DRAM微缩的根本性挑战，并介绍三星4F² COP DRAM作为一种创新解决方案，最后将其置于行业发展和市场需求的宏观背景下评估。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从具体产品（GDDR7）的性能对比，上升到DRAM技术面临的普遍缩放挑战。
understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将过渡到非易失性存储（如NAND Flash，即BiCS10）或其他内存技术，形成从DRAM到其他存储类型的逻辑推进。
key_points: DRAM持续微缩面临挑战。
三星4F² COP DRAM通过重组子字线驱动器（SWD）等创新减少信号数量。
尽管有挑战，混合键合4F² DRAM预计在本十年末、1d节点之后出现。
当前内存市场格局既激励高密度新节点以提高比特产出，也追求高性能/价格比。

paragraphs.source: Samsung noted that the VCT DRAM suffers from the floating-body effect, increasing leakage and reducing retention time. Mitigating this effect remains a key challenge for 4F² adoption.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Samsung noted that the VCT DRAM suffers from the floating-body effect, increasing leakage and reducing retention time. Mitigating this effect remains a key challenge for 4F² adoption.

pro.text: 三星指出，VCT DRAM存在浮体效应问题，这会增加漏电流并缩短数据保持时间。如何抑制这一效应，仍是4F²技术得以广泛应用所面临的关键挑战。

paragraphs.source: Despite these challenges, we still expect 4F² hybrid bonded DRAM to arrive in the latter part of the decade as early as the generation after 1d. Our memory model tracks the timing and ramp of each node in detail. The current memory pricing landscape largely incentivizes the ramp and introduction of new nodes with higher bit densities to improve bit output per fab. On the otherhand, performance/$ of memory is highly sought after more than capacity for many use cases.

inline_elements.text: memory model tracks the timing and ramp of each node in detail

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Despite these challenges, we still expect 4F² hybrid bonded DRAM to arrive in the latter part of the decade as early as the generation after 1d. Our [memory model tracks the timing and ramp of each node in detail](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/). The current memory pricing landscape largely incentivizes the ramp and introduction of new nodes with higher bit densities to improve bit output per fab. On the otherhand, performance/$ of memory is highly sought after more than capacity for many use cases.

parent_inline_elements.text: memory model tracks the timing and ramp of each node in detail

pro.text: 尽管存在这些挑战，我们仍然预计采用混合键合的4F² DRAM将在本十年晚些时候到来，最早可能是在1d制程节点之后的下一代产品中。我们的内存模型详细追踪了每个制程节点的时间表和量产进度。当前的内存定价环境在很大程度上激励着厂商推进并引入具有更高比特密度的新制程节点，以提高每座晶圆厂的比特产出。另一方面，对于许多应用场景，内存的性价比比容量本身更受重视。

将技术细节（SWD重组）与行业洞察（市场激励）结合，翻译时需保持这种深度。

understanding.role_in_article: 探讨DRAM微缩的根本性挑战，并介绍三星4F² COP DRAM作为一种创新解决方案，最后将其置于行业发展和市场需求的宏观背景下评估。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从具体产品（GDDR7）的性能对比，上升到DRAM技术面临的普遍缩放挑战。
understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将过渡到非易失性存储（如NAND Flash，即BiCS10）或其他内存技术，形成从DRAM到其他存储类型的逻辑推进。
key_points: DRAM持续微缩面临挑战。
三星4F² COP DRAM通过重组子字线驱动器（SWD）等创新减少信号数量。
尽管有挑战，混合键合4F² DRAM预计在本十年末、1d节点之后出现。
当前内存市场格局既激励高密度新节点以提高比特产出，也追求高性能/价格比。
translation_notes: “4F²”和“COP”（Cell-Over-Periphery）是专业术语，需准确翻译或保留英文并加注。
“hybrid bonded”译为“混合键合”。
“performance/$”译为“性能/价格比”或“每美元性能”。
“On the otherhand”引导的对比关系需清晰翻译（如“另一方面”）。
将技术细节（SWD重组）与行业洞察（市场激励）结合，翻译时需保持这种深度。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致，且首次出现时未按指南要求加注中文全称。
术语翻译不一致，且首次出现时未按指南要求加注中文全称。
句式略显平行和机械，可以调整得更流畅，以体现原文的对比关系。
‘都是将...堆叠在...之上’的表述略显冗长，可以更简洁。
译文‘对于其他NAND制造商而言确实如此’语气略显中性，未能完全传递原文隐含的对比和轻微质疑意味。
‘重组为16组，每组8个’表述清晰，但‘这使得...’略显翻译腔，可以更直接。
‘这虽然需要...但将...’的转折关系处理得很好。‘每个数据引脚对应的...数量’可以更简洁。
‘核心电路——即位线感测放大器（BLSA）和子字线驱动器（SWD）——’的破折号使用正确，但‘可以放置在’略显被动，可以更主动。
‘这使其能够...，并减少...’的句式稍显冗长。‘不位于任何存储单元下方的’定语较长。
术语翻译不一致。前文译为‘性能/价格比’，此处译为‘性能/价格比（performance/$）’，括号内英文与符号不一致。
‘更受重视’的翻译准确，但‘对于许多应用场景而言，...比单纯追求容量更受重视。’句式可以更精炼，信息密度更高。

paragraphs.source: SanDisk and Kioxia demonstrated their BiCS10 NAND, with 332 layers and 3 decks. This is the highest reported NAND bit density, at 37.6 Gb/mm², dethroning the previous champion, SK Hynix’s 321L V9.

inline_elements.text: SK Hynix’s 321L V9

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: SanDisk and Kioxia demonstrated their BiCS10 NAND, with 332 layers and 3 decks. This is the highest reported NAND bit density, at 37.6 Gb/mm², dethroning the previous champion, [SK Hynix’s 321L V9](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/i/184077729/3d-nand-hynix-321-layer).
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: SanDisk and Kioxia demonstrated their BiCS10 NAND, with 332 layers and 3 decks. This is the highest reported NAND bit density, at 37.6 Gb/mm², dethroning the previous champion, SK Hynix’s 321L V9.

parent_inline_elements.text: SK Hynix’s 321L V9

pro.text: 闪迪（SanDisk）与铠侠（Kioxia）展示了其BiCS10 NAND闪存，该产品拥有332层，由3个栈（deck）构成。其位密度达到37.6 Gb/mm²，是目前公开报告中的最高纪录，超越了此前保持领先的SK海力士321层V9 NAND。
pro.tokenized_text: 闪迪（SanDisk）与铠侠（Kioxia）展示了其BiCS10 NAND闪存，该产品拥有332层，由3个栈（deck）构成。其位密度达到37.6 Gb/mm²，是目前公开报告中的最高纪录，超越了此前保持领先的[[[LINK_1|SK海力士321层V9 NAND]]]。

applied_terms: “BiCS”是“Bit Cost Scaling”的缩写，是铠侠/西数的3D NAND品牌，可保留“BiCS”并加注“3D NAND”。
公司名“SanDisk”现属西部数据，需注意与“Kioxia”（铠侠）的合资关系，翻译时可处理为“西部数据/铠侠”或“SanDisk/铠侠”。
需准备相关NAND术语（如层数、单元类型、IO速度等）的准确翻译。

understanding.role_in_article: （根据现有摘要推断）从DRAM领域过渡到非易失性存储领域，介绍SanDisk/Kioxia的BiCS10 NAND Flash技术，可能涉及层数、密度、性能等指标。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从易失性内存（DRAM）转向非易失性存储（NAND Flash），完成内存章节内的技术类别覆盖。
understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将结束内存章节，或引出其他技术亮点（如温度传感器），或直接过渡到文章下一大主题（如光网络）。
key_points: SanDisk/Kioxia展示了其BiCS10 NAND闪存技术。
translation_notes: “BiCS”是“Bit Cost Scaling”的缩写，是铠侠/西数的3D NAND品牌，可保留“BiCS”并加注“3D NAND”。
公司名“SanDisk”现属西部数据，需注意与“Kioxia”（铠侠）的合资关系，翻译时可处理为“西部数据/铠侠”或“SanDisk/铠侠”。

issues.description: 术语“decks”的翻译“堆叠结构”不够精确，且与后文“平面配置”中的“平面”概念可能混淆。
“是目前已公开报告中的最高值”这一表述稍显口语化，且“冠军”的比喻在科技语境中略显随意。
译文“这再次印证了SK海力士的落后地位”语气略显生硬和绝对化。原文“trailing position”是客观描述，译文“落后地位”带有更强的价值判断色彩。
“将输入/输出（IO）带宽提升了50%”中的“将...提升了”是典型的“将”字句翻译腔。
译文“可将芯片面积减少2.1%”中的“可”字，暗示了一种可能性，但原文“reduces area by 2.1%”是陈述一个确定的结果或优势。
“得以定制其CMOS晶圆工艺”中的“得以”稍显书面化，且“其”指代略模糊（指CBA架构还是公司？）。
译文“堆叠更多芯片对于提升存储密度至关重要。然而，在多芯片架构中，未选中芯片的空闲电流正逐渐接近选中芯片的工作电流。”信息准确，但两句间的转折关系可以更紧凑。

paragraphs.source: Despite using a similar architecture with 6 planes, 3 decks, and a similar number of layers, SK Hynix falls behind, with 30% lower bit density. In a QLC configuration, BiCS10 has a bit density of 37.6 Gb/mm², while SK Hynix’s V9 has a bit density of only 28.8 Gb/mm². While in a TLC configuration, the densities are 29 and 21 Gb/mm² respectively, another example of SK Hynix’s trailing position.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Despite using a similar architecture with 6 planes, 3 decks, and a similar number of layers, SK Hynix falls behind, with 30% lower bit density. In a QLC configuration, BiCS10 has a bit density of 37.6 Gb/mm², while SK Hynix’s V9 has a bit density of only 28.8 Gb/mm². While in a TLC configuration, the densities are 29 and 21 Gb/mm² respectively, another example of SK Hynix’s trailing position.

In a QLC configuration, BiCS10 has a bit density of 37.6 Gb/mm², while SK Hynix’s V9 has a bit density of only 28.8 Gb/mm². While in a TLC configuration, the densities are 29 and 21 Gb/mm² respectively, another example of SK Hynix’s trailing position.

pro.text: 尽管采用了相似的架构（6个平面、3个堆叠结构，且层数相近），SK海力士的位密度却落后了30%。在QLC（四层单元）配置下，BiCS10的位密度为37.6 Gb/mm²，而SK海力士V9仅为28.8 Gb/mm²。在TLC（三层单元）配置下，两者的密度分别为29 Gb/mm²和21 Gb/mm²，这进一步凸显了SK海力士在密度上的差距。

applied_terms: “BiCS”是“Bit Cost Scaling”的缩写，是铠侠/西数的3D NAND品牌，可保留“BiCS”并加注“3D NAND”。
公司名“SanDisk”现属西部数据，需注意与“Kioxia”（铠侠）的合资关系，翻译时可处理为“西部数据/铠侠”或“SanDisk/铠侠”。
需准备相关NAND术语（如层数、单元类型、IO速度等）的准确翻译。

understanding.role_in_article: （根据现有摘要推断）从DRAM领域过渡到非易失性存储领域，介绍SanDisk/Kioxia的BiCS10 NAND Flash技术，可能涉及层数、密度、性能等指标。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从易失性内存（DRAM）转向非易失性存储（NAND Flash），完成内存章节内的技术类别覆盖。
understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将结束内存章节，或引出其他技术亮点（如温度传感器），或直接过渡到文章下一大主题（如光网络）。
key_points: SanDisk/Kioxia展示了其BiCS10 NAND闪存技术。
translation_notes: “BiCS”是“Bit Cost Scaling”的缩写，是铠侠/西数的3D NAND品牌，可保留“BiCS”并加注“3D NAND”。
公司名“SanDisk”现属西部数据，需注意与“Kioxia”（铠侠）的合资关系，翻译时可处理为“西部数据/铠侠”或“SanDisk/铠侠”。
需准备相关NAND术语（如层数、单元类型、IO速度等）的准确翻译。

issues.description: 术语“decks”的翻译“堆叠结构”不够精确，且与后文“平面配置”中的“平面”概念可能混淆。
“是目前已公开报告中的最高值”这一表述稍显口语化，且“冠军”的比喻在科技语境中略显随意。
译文“这再次印证了SK海力士的落后地位”语气略显生硬和绝对化。原文“trailing position”是客观描述，译文“落后地位”带有更强的价值判断色彩。
“将输入/输出（IO）带宽提升了50%”中的“将...提升了”是典型的“将”字句翻译腔。
译文“可将芯片面积减少2.1%”中的“可”字，暗示了一种可能性，但原文“reduces area by 2.1%”是陈述一个确定的结果或优势。
“得以定制其CMOS晶圆工艺”中的“得以”稍显书面化，且“其”指代略模糊（指CBA架构还是公司？）。
译文“堆叠更多芯片对于提升存储密度至关重要。然而，在多芯片架构中，未选中芯片的空闲电流正逐渐接近选中芯片的工作电流。”信息准确，但两句间的转折关系可以更紧凑。

paragraphs.source: Moreover, BiCS10 features a 6-plane configuration, increasing IO bandwidth by 50%. There are two ways to implement a 6-plane configuration, 1×6 and 2×3. SK Hynix chose to use a 2×3 configuration, while SanDisk and Kioxia have decided to use a 1×6 configuration.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Moreover, BiCS10 features a 6-plane configuration, increasing IO bandwidth by 50%. There are two ways to implement a 6-plane configuration, 1×6 and 2×3. SK Hynix chose to use a 2×3 configuration, while SanDisk and Kioxia have decided to use a 1×6 configuration.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Moreover, BiCS10 features a 6-plane configuration, increasing IO bandwidth by 50%. There are two ways to implement a 6-plane configuration, 1×6 and 2×3. SK Hynix chose to use a 2×3 configuration, while SanDisk and Kioxia have decided to use a 1×6 configuration.

pro.text: 此外，BiCS10采用了6平面配置，使其输入/输出（IO）带宽提升了50%。实现6平面配置有两种方式：1×6和2×3。SK海力士选择了2×3配置，而闪迪和铠侠则决定采用1×6配置。

paragraphs.source: A 1x6 configuration has fewer ground pads and reduces area by 2.1%. However, the lower number of ground pads and vertical power tracks constrains power distribution.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A 1x6 configuration has fewer ground pads and reduces area by 2.1%. However, the lower number of ground pads and vertical power tracks constrains power distribution.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A 1x6 configuration has fewer ground pads and reduces area by 2.1%. However, the lower number of ground pads and vertical power tracks constrains power distribution.

pro.text: 1×6配置的地线焊盘数量更少，能使芯片面积减少2.1%。然而，地线焊盘和垂直电源走线数量的减少，也对电源分配构成了限制。

understanding.relation_to_next: 预计将结束内存章节，或引出其他技术亮点（如温度传感器），或直接过渡到文章下一大主题（如光网络）。
key_points: SanDisk/Kioxia展示了其BiCS10 NAND闪存技术。
translation_notes: “BiCS”是“Bit Cost Scaling”的缩写，是铠侠/西数的3D NAND品牌，可保留“BiCS”并加注“3D NAND”。
公司名“SanDisk”现属西部数据，需注意与“Kioxia”（铠侠）的合资关系，翻译时可处理为“西部数据/铠侠”或“SanDisk/铠侠”。
需准备相关NAND术语（如层数、单元类型、IO速度等）的准确翻译。

issues.description: 术语“decks”的翻译“堆叠结构”不够精确，且与后文“平面配置”中的“平面”概念可能混淆。
“是目前已公开报告中的最高值”这一表述稍显口语化，且“冠军”的比喻在科技语境中略显随意。
译文“这再次印证了SK海力士的落后地位”语气略显生硬和绝对化。原文“trailing position”是客观描述，译文“落后地位”带有更强的价值判断色彩。
“将输入/输出（IO）带宽提升了50%”中的“将...提升了”是典型的“将”字句翻译腔。
译文“可将芯片面积减少2.1%”中的“可”字，暗示了一种可能性，但原文“reduces area by 2.1%”是陈述一个确定的结果或优势。
“得以定制其CMOS晶圆工艺”中的“得以”稍显书面化，且“其”指代略模糊（指CBA架构还是公司？）。
译文“堆叠更多芯片对于提升存储密度至关重要。然而，在多芯片架构中，未选中芯片的空闲电流正逐渐接近选中芯片的工作电流。”信息准确，但两句间的转折关系可以更紧凑。

paragraphs.source: By using the CBA (Cell Bonded Array) architecture, SanDisk and Kioxia are able to customize the CMOS wafer process. By adding another top-metal layer in parallel to the existing one, they created a stronger power grid and overcame their power distribution constraints.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: By using the CBA (Cell Bonded Array) architecture, SanDisk and Kioxia are able to customize the CMOS wafer process. By adding another top-metal layer in parallel to the existing one, they created a stronger power grid and overcame their power distribution constraints.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: By using the CBA (Cell Bonded Array) architecture, SanDisk and Kioxia are able to customize the CMOS wafer process. By adding another top-metal layer in parallel to the existing one, they created a stronger power grid and overcame their power distribution constraints.

pro.text: 通过采用单元键合阵列（CBA）架构，闪迪和铠侠能够定制CMOS晶圆的制造工艺。他们在现有顶层金属层的基础上，并行增设了另一层，从而构建了更强大的电源网格，并克服了电源分配的限制。

paragraphs.source: Stacking more dies is essential to increasing storage density. However, in multi-die architectures, the idle current from unselected dies is approaching the active current of the selected die. SanDisk implemented a gating system to fully shut down the data path of the unselected dies, reducing the idle current by two orders of magnitude.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Stacking more dies is essential to increasing storage density. However, in multi-die architectures, the idle current from unselected dies is approaching the active current of the selected die. SanDisk implemented a gating system to fully shut down the data path of the unselected dies, reducing the idle current by two orders of magnitude.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Stacking more dies is essential to increasing storage density. However, in multi-die architectures, the idle current from unselected dies is approaching the active current of the selected die. SanDisk implemented a gating system to fully shut down the data path of the unselected dies, reducing the idle current by two orders of magnitude.

pro.text: 虽然堆叠更多芯片对提升存储密度至关重要，但在多芯片架构中，未选中芯片的空闲电流正逐渐接近选中芯片的工作电流。为此，闪迪实现了一套关断系统，能够完全关闭未选中芯片的数据通路，从而将空闲电流降低了两个数量级。

paragraphs.source: SRAM scaling is dead. Despite logic area decreasing by 40% from N5 to N2, 8-transistor high-current SRAM bitcells have only decreased in area by 18%. 6-transistor high-current (6T-HC) bitcells are even worse, only decreasing by 2%. Assist circuitry has scaled more, but it's not free lunch.

inline_elements.text: SRAM scaling is dead.

Assist circuitry has scaled more, but it's not free lunch.

parent_inline_elements.text: SRAM scaling is dead.

pro.text: SRAM微缩已死。 尽管逻辑面积从N5到N2减少了40%，但8晶体管高电流SRAM存储单元的面积仅减少了18%。6晶体管高电流（6T-HC）存储单元的情况更糟，仅减少了2%。辅助电路的微缩效果更明显，但这并非免费的午餐。

paragraphs.source: It is well known that N3E’s high-density bitcell is a regression from N3B’s, falling back to N5’s density. In this paper, MediaTek shed some light on the high-current bitcell. N3E’s high-current bitcell increased in area by 1-2% over N5. The density decreased from ~39.0 Mib/mm² to ~38.5 Mib/mm². Do note these figures do not account for assist circuitry overhead.

In this paper, MediaTek shed some light on the high-current bitcell. N3E’s high-current bitcell increased in area by 1-2% over N5. The density decreased from ~39.0 Mib/mm² to ~38.5 Mib/mm². Do note these figures do not account for assist circuitry overhead.

paragraphs.source: In modern logic nodes, 6T bitcells have 4 NMOS and 2 PMOS transistors, while 8T bitcells have 6 and 2 respectively. The unequal number of NMOS and PMOS transistors requires specialized rules and makes layout more inefficient. MediaTek’s novel bitcell is a 10-transistor cell, named the xBIT, with 4 NMOS and 6 PMOS transistors or vice versa. The two variants of the bitcell can be arranged together into a rectangular block, with 20 transistors, storing 2 bits.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In modern logic nodes, 6T bitcells have 4 NMOS and 2 PMOS transistors, while 8T bitcells have 6 and 2 respectively. The unequal number of NMOS and PMOS transistors requires specialized rules and makes layout more inefficient. MediaTek’s novel bitcell is a 10-transistor cell, named the xBIT, with 4 NMOS and 6 PMOS transistors or vice versa. The two variants of the bitcell can be arranged together into a rectangular block, with 20 transistors, storing 2 bits.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In modern logic nodes, 6T bitcells have 4 NMOS and 2 PMOS transistors, while 8T bitcells have 6 and 2 respectively. The unequal number of NMOS and PMOS transistors requires specialized rules and makes layout more inefficient. MediaTek’s novel bitcell is a 10-transistor cell, named the xBIT, with 4 NMOS and 6 PMOS transistors or vice versa. The two variants of the bitcell can be arranged together into a rectangular block, with 20 transistors, storing 2 bits.

pro.text: 在现代逻辑工艺节点中，6晶体管存储单元包含4个NMOS和2个PMOS晶体管，而8晶体管存储单元则分别包含6个和2个。NMOS与PMOS晶体管数量不相等，这需要特殊的布局规则，从而降低了版图效率。联发科的新型存储单元是一个10晶体管单元，命名为xBIT，其构成为4个NMOS和6个PMOS晶体管，或者反之亦然。这两种变体的存储单元可以组合排列成一个矩形块，包含20个晶体管，存储2比特数据。

paragraphs.source: When compared to the PDK’s standard 8T bitcells, the xBIT achieved 22% to 63% higher density, with the largest gains at lower wordline widths. Power has also improved greatly, with the average read/write power reduced by over 30%, and leakage reduced by 29% at 0.5V. At 0.9V, performance was similar to an 8T bitcell and at 0.5V, although it was 16% slower than the 8T bitcell, it was fast enough not to be the bottleneck in a processor, and the voltage range was large enough for voltage-frequency scaling.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: When compared to the PDK’s standard 8T bitcells, the xBIT achieved 22% to 63% higher density, with the largest gains at lower wordline widths. Power has also improved greatly, with the average read/write power reduced by over 30%, and leakage reduced by 29% at 0.5V. At 0.9V, performance was similar to an 8T bitcell and at 0.5V, although it was 16% slower than the 8T bitcell, it was fast enough not to be the bottleneck in a processor, and the voltage range was large enough for voltage-frequency scaling.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: When compared to the PDK’s standard 8T bitcells, the xBIT achieved 22% to 63% higher density, with the largest gains at lower wordline widths. Power has also improved greatly, with the average read/write power reduced by over 30%, and leakage reduced by 29% at 0.5V. At 0.9V, performance was similar to an 8T bitcell and at 0.5V, although it was 16% slower than the 8T bitcell, it was fast enough not to be the bottleneck in a processor, and the voltage range was large enough for voltage-frequency scaling.

pro.text: 与工艺设计套件中的标准8晶体管存储单元相比，xBIT的密度提升了22%至63%，在字线宽度较低时增益最大。功耗也得到显著改善，平均读写功耗降低了30%以上，在0.5V电压下漏电降低了29%。在0.9V电压下，其性能与8晶体管存储单元相当；在0.5V电压下，其速度虽比8T存储单元慢16%，但已足以避免成为处理器瓶颈，且其工作电压范围足够宽，适用于电压频率调节。

paragraphs.source: TSMC presented an updated STT-MRAM on their N16 node, building on their previous work from ISSCC 2023. TSMC is positioning the MRAM as an embedded non-volatile memory (eNVM), for use in automotive, industrial, and edge applications, which do not need the most advanced technology but instead reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC presented an updated STT-MRAM on their N16 node, building on their previous work from ISSCC 2023. TSMC is positioning the MRAM as an embedded non-volatile memory (eNVM), for use in automotive, industrial, and edge applications, which do not need the most advanced technology but instead reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC presented an updated STT-MRAM on their N16 node, building on their previous work from ISSCC 2023. TSMC is positioning the MRAM as an embedded non-volatile memory (eNVM), for use in automotive, industrial, and edge applications, which do not need the most advanced technology but instead reliability.

pro.text: 台积电展示了其基于N16制程节点的更新版自旋转移矩磁阻随机存取存储器（STT-MRAM），该工作建立在2023年ISSCC上先前研究的基础上。台积电将这款MRAM定位为嵌入式非易失性存储器，主要面向汽车、工业和边缘应用。这些应用场景并不追求最先进的制程技术，而是将可靠性置于首位。

paragraphs.source: The MRAM features dual-port access so reads and writes can occur simultaneously — critical for over-the-air (OTA) updates in automotive, where the system cannot halt reads while firmware is being written.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The MRAM features dual-port access so reads and writes can occur simultaneously — critical for over-the-air (OTA) updates in automotive, where the system cannot halt reads while firmware is being written.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The MRAM features dual-port access so reads and writes can occur simultaneously — critical for over-the-air (OTA) updates in automotive, where the system cannot halt reads while firmware is being written.

pro.text: 这款MRAM具备双端口访问能力，因此读取和写入操作可以同时进行。这一特性对于汽车应用中的空中下载更新至关重要，因为在写入固件时，系统不能中断读取操作。

paragraphs.source: It features interleaved reads across modules with independent clocks, raising throughput to 51.2 Gb/s at 200 MHz. On silicon, the 84 Mb macro achieves 7.5ns read access time at 0.8V across -40 °C to 150 °C.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: It features interleaved reads across modules with independent clocks, raising throughput to 51.2 Gb/s at 200 MHz. On silicon, the 84 Mb macro achieves 7.5ns read access time at 0.8V across -40 °C to 150 °C.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: It features interleaved reads across modules with independent clocks, raising throughput to 51.2 Gb/s at 200 MHz. On silicon, the 84 Mb macro achieves 7.5ns read access time at 0.8V across -40 °C to 150 °C.

pro.text: 其设计特点在于，支持跨模块的交错读取，且各模块拥有独立时钟。这使得在200MHz频率下，吞吐量提升至51.2 Gb/s。在硅芯片上，这个84 Mb的宏单元在0.8V电压、-40°C至150°C的温度范围内，实现了7.5纳秒的读取访问时间。

paragraphs.source: The architecture is modular — configurable in 16 Mb, 8 Mb and 2 Mb modules that compose into macros from 8 Mb to 128 Mb. By combining large 16 Mb modules with a few smaller 2 Mb and 8 Mb modules, the capacity can be fine tuned to the needs of any design. For example, 5× 16 Mb modules and 2× 2 Mb modules form an 84 Mb macro.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The architecture is modular — configurable in 16 Mb, 8 Mb and 2 Mb modules that compose into macros from 8 Mb to 128 Mb. By combining large 16 Mb modules with a few smaller 2 Mb and 8 Mb modules, the capacity can be fine tuned to the needs of any design. For example, 5× 16 Mb modules and 2× 2 Mb modules form an 84 Mb macro.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The architecture is modular — configurable in 16 Mb, 8 Mb and 2 Mb modules that compose into macros from 8 Mb to 128 Mb. By combining large 16 Mb modules with a few smaller 2 Mb and 8 Mb modules, the capacity can be fine tuned to the needs of any design. For example, 5× 16 Mb modules and 2× 2 Mb modules form an 84 Mb macro.

pro.text: 该架构采用模块化设计——可配置为16 Mb、8 Mb和2 Mb的模块，这些模块组合成从8 Mb到128 Mb不等的宏单元。通过将大型的16 Mb模块与少量较小的2 Mb和8 Mb模块相结合，可以针对任何设计的需求对容量进行微调。例如，5个16 Mb模块和2个2 Mb模块即可构成一个84 Mb的宏单元。

paragraphs.source: As stated earlier, reliability is where embedded MRAM lives or dies. After 1 million endurance cycles at -40 °C, the hard error rate stays well below 0.01 ppm — well within ECC correction range. Read disturb at 150 °C is below 10⁻²² ppm at typical read voltages, effectively negligible. The 168 Mb test chip passes reflow and supports 20-year retention at 150 °C, meeting stringent automotive requirements.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As stated earlier, reliability is where embedded MRAM lives or dies. After 1 million endurance cycles at -40 °C, the hard error rate stays well below 0.01 ppm — well within ECC correction range. Read disturb at 150 °C is below 10⁻²² ppm at typical read voltages, effectively negligible. The 168 Mb test chip passes reflow and supports 20-year retention at 150 °C, meeting stringent automotive requirements.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As stated earlier, reliability is where embedded MRAM lives or dies. After 1 million endurance cycles at -40 °C, the hard error rate stays well below 0.01 ppm — well within ECC correction range. Read disturb at 150 °C is below 10⁻²² ppm at typical read voltages, effectively negligible. The 168 Mb test chip passes reflow and supports 20-year retention at 150 °C, meeting stringent automotive requirements.

pro.text: 如前所述，可靠性是嵌入式MRAM成败的关键。在-40°C下经过100万次耐久性循环后，其硬错误率仍远低于0.01 ppm——完全处于ECC（纠错码）的校正范围内。在150°C下，典型读取电压时的读取干扰低于10⁻²² ppm，实际上可忽略不计。这款168 Mb的测试芯片通过了回流焊测试，并支持在150°C下保持20年的数据保存期，满足了严苛的汽车应用要求。

paragraphs.source: Compared to the old MRAM on the same N16 node, the bitcell has shrunk 25% from 0.033 µm² to 0.0249 µm², and macro density increases to 16.0 Mb/mm² iso-capacity. The read speed drops from 6 ns to 5.5 ns iso-capacity, and the dual-port access and interleaved reads are entirely new.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Compared to the old MRAM on the same N16 node, the bitcell has shrunk 25% from 0.033 µm² to 0.0249 µm², and macro density increases to 16.0 Mb/mm² iso-capacity. The read speed drops from 6 ns to 5.5 ns iso-capacity, and the dual-port access and interleaved reads are entirely new.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Compared to the old MRAM on the same N16 node, the bitcell has shrunk 25% from 0.033 µm² to 0.0249 µm², and macro density increases to 16.0 Mb/mm² iso-capacity. The read speed drops from 6 ns to 5.5 ns iso-capacity, and the dual-port access and interleaved reads are entirely new.

pro.text: 与同一N16节点上的旧款MRAM相比，其存储单元面积缩小了25%，从0.033 µm²降至0.0249 µm²，等容量下的宏单元密度则提升至16.0 Mb/mm²。读取速度在等容量下从6 ns降至5.5 ns，而双端口访问和交错读取功能则完全是新增的。

paragraphs.source: While Samsung Foundry also published work on 8LPP eMRAM this year, TSMC’s is far more promising. It targets the needed features, has great performance, and is on a cheaper N16 node.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: While Samsung Foundry also published work on 8LPP eMRAM this year, TSMC’s is far more promising. It targets the needed features, has great performance, and is on a cheaper N16 node.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: While Samsung Foundry also published work on 8LPP eMRAM this year, TSMC’s is far more promising. It targets the needed features, has great performance, and is on a cheaper N16 node.

pro.text: 尽管三星晶圆代工厂今年也发布了基于8LPP制程的嵌入式MRAM（eMRAM）研究成果，但台积电的方案显得更有前景。它不仅瞄准了所需的关键特性，性能表现优异，而且基于成本更低的N16制程节点。

paragraphs.source: Several papers from major optics vendors tackled optical interconnects that will carry data between next-generation AI accelerators both within and between datacenters.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Several papers from major optics vendors tackled optical interconnects that will carry data between next-generation AI accelerators both within and between datacenters.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Several papers from major optics vendors tackled optical interconnects that will carry data between next-generation AI accelerators both within and between datacenters.

pro.text: 多家主流光学器件供应商的论文聚焦于光学互连技术，该技术将负责在下一代AI加速器之间，以及数据中心内部与数据中心之间传输数据。

issues.description: 译文句式略显冗余，信息密度可提升。"该技术将在...传输数据"的表述稍显拖沓。
中文表达可以更地道。"内部和之间"的并列结构稍显生硬。

paragraphs.source: The choice of optical signaling format will affect the go-to-market timeline for scale-up co-packaged optics (CPO). Nvidia is ramping up production of COUPE optical engines that support 200G per lane PAM4 for scale-out switching in the near-term.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The choice of optical signaling format will affect the go-to-market timeline for scale-up co-packaged optics (CPO). Nvidia is ramping up production of COUPE optical engines that support 200G per lane PAM4 for scale-out switching in the near-term.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The choice of optical signaling format will affect the go-to-market timeline for scale-up co-packaged optics (CPO). Nvidia is ramping up production of COUPE optical engines that support 200G per lane PAM4 for scale-out switching in the near-term.

pro.text: 光学信号格式的选择将影响纵向扩展（scale-up）共封装光学（CPO）产品的上市时间表。英伟达正在加速生产其COUPE光学引擎，该引擎支持每通道200G PAM4，旨在短期内用于横向扩展（scale-out）交换。

issues.description: 关键术语“scale-up”首次出现时未加注中文解释，且与后文“纵向扩展”的译法存在潜在不一致。
术语“chip shoreline”的翻译“芯片海岸线长度”略显生硬，且“海岸线长度的利用效率”表述不够简洁。
译文“我是不是听到有人提到了OCS？”语气略显平淡，未能完全还原原文略带反问和引导性的口语化修辞。
译文“200G PAM4 DR光学（500米距离规格）”中，“（500米距离规格）”为译者补充的解释。虽然有助于理解，但属于原文未明确信息，可能带来解读偏差。
译文句子较长，且“围绕...制定...标准”与“主要采用...进行...”的句式略显重复和书面化。
译文“中间图（b）所示的实现方案，在未来几年内将是用于纵向与横向扩展CPO的最常见方案。但它仍然需要...”将长句合理拆分，但“但它仍然需要”的转折略显突兀。
译文“这有望显著提升单位海岸线长度的带宽密度，支持更高的端口数（基数），并改善能效。”中“单位海岸线长度的”稍显冗余，“基数”的括号解释打断了句子节奏。

paragraphs.source: However, at ISSCC, Nvidia proposed using 32 Gb/s per lambda, with 8 wavelengths multiplexed using DWDM. A 9th wavelength is used for clock forwarding at half rate — that is 16 Gb/s.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: However, at ISSCC, Nvidia proposed using 32 Gb/s per lambda, with 8 wavelengths multiplexed using DWDM. A 9th wavelength is used for clock forwarding at half rate — that is 16 Gb/s.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: However, at ISSCC, Nvidia proposed using 32 Gb/s per lambda, with 8 wavelengths multiplexed using DWDM. A 9th wavelength is used for clock forwarding at half rate — that is 16 Gb/s.

pro.text: 然而，在ISSCC上，英伟达提出了使用每波长32 Gb/s的方案，并通过DWDM复用8个波长。第9个波长以半速率（即16 Gb/s）用于时钟转发。

paragraphs.source: Clock forwarding means that SerDes can be made somewhat simpler by removing the Clock and Data Recovery (CDR) circuit as well as other circuitry, improving energy and chip shoreline efficiency.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Clock forwarding means that SerDes can be made somewhat simpler by removing the Clock and Data Recovery (CDR) circuit as well as other circuitry, improving energy and chip shoreline efficiency.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Clock forwarding means that SerDes can be made somewhat simpler by removing the Clock and Data Recovery (CDR) circuit as well as other circuitry, improving energy and chip shoreline efficiency.

pro.text: 时钟转发意味着可以通过移除时钟数据恢复（CDR）电路以及其他相关电路，使串行器/解串器设计在一定程度上得以简化，从而提升能效和芯片海岸线（shoreline）效率。

paragraphs.source: Earlier in March, just before OFC 2026, the formation of the Optical Compute Interconnect MSA (OCI MSA) was announced, and it will focus on a 200 Gb/s Bi-directional link, with each of transmit and receive formed using 4 lambdas of 50G NRZ, which will be sent bi-directionally across the same fiber. Did I hear anyone mention OCS?

inline_elements.text: formation of the Optical Compute Interconnect MSA

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Earlier in March, just before OFC 2026, the [formation of the Optical Compute Interconnect MSA](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260312254951/en/Optical-Scale-up-Consortium-Established-to-Create-an-Open-Specification-for-AI-Infrastructure-Led-by-Founding-Members-AMD-Broadcom-Meta-Microsoft-NVIDIA-and-OpenAI) (OCI MSA) was announced, and it will focus on a 200 Gb/s Bi-directional link, with each of transmit and receive formed using 4 lambdas of 50G NRZ, which will be sent bi-directionally across the same fiber. Did I hear anyone mention OCS?
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Earlier in March, just before OFC 2026, the formation of the Optical Compute Interconnect MSA (OCI MSA) was announced, and it will focus on a 200 Gb/s Bi-directional link, with each of transmit and receive formed using 4 lambdas of 50G NRZ, which will be sent bi-directionally across the same fiber. Did I hear anyone mention OCS?

parent_inline_elements.text: formation of the Optical Compute Interconnect MSA

pro.text: 早在今年三月，恰在OFC 2026之前，光学计算互连多源协议（OCI MSA）宣布成立，该协议将专注于200 Gb/s双向链路，其发送和接收均采用4个50G NRZ波长，并通过同一根光纤双向传输。是不是有人提到了OCS？
pro.tokenized_text: 早在今年三月，恰在OFC 2026之前，[[[LINK_1|光学计算互连多源协议（OCI MSA）宣布成立]]]，该协议将专注于200 Gb/s双向链路，其发送和接收均采用4个50G NRZ波长，并通过同一根光纤双向传输。是不是有人提到了OCS？

paragraphs.source: Interestingly, the OCI MSA did not make use of an additional wavelength for clock forwarding, and it appears that reserving all wavelengths for actual data transmission is the priority.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Interestingly, the OCI MSA did not make use of an additional wavelength for clock forwarding, and it appears that reserving all wavelengths for actual data transmission is the priority.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Interestingly, the OCI MSA did not make use of an additional wavelength for clock forwarding, and it appears that reserving all wavelengths for actual data transmission is the priority.

pro.text: 有趣的是，光学计算互连多源协议（OCI MSA）并未使用额外的波长进行时钟转发。这似乎表明，将所有波长保留用于实际数据传输是其优先考虑的事项。

paragraphs.source: Much of Nvidia’s published research on scale-up CPO has centered on DWDM, though today’s CPO optical engines are oriented around 200G PAM4 DR Optics, which makes more sense for scale-out networking. The OCI MSA centering around DWDM for scale-up optics resolves this apparent contradiction, as it is now clear that Nvidia and others will center around the use of DWDM for scale-up and DR Optics for scale-out.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Much of Nvidia’s published research on scale-up CPO has centered on DWDM, though today’s CPO optical engines are oriented around 200G PAM4 DR Optics, which makes more sense for scale-out networking. The OCI MSA centering around DWDM for scale-up optics resolves this apparent contradiction, as it is now clear that Nvidia and others will center around the use of DWDM for scale-up and DR Optics for scale-out.

The OCI MSA centering around DWDM for scale-up optics resolves this apparent contradiction, as it is now clear that Nvidia and others will center around the use of DWDM for scale-up and DR Optics for scale-out.

pro.text: 英伟达已发表的关于纵向扩展（scale-up）共封装光学（CPO）的研究大多集中在密集波分复用（DWDM）技术上。然而，当今的CPO光学引擎主要围绕200G PAM4 DR光学构建，这更适合横向扩展（scale-out）网络。OCI MSA围绕DWDM制定纵向扩展光学标准，正好化解了这一矛盾。现在情况已很明确：英伟达及其他厂商将主要采用DWDM进行纵向扩展，而采用DR光学进行横向扩展。

paragraphs.source: The OCI MSA also illustrates different implementations, an On-Board Optics (OBO), a version of CPO that is integrated via the substrate on the ASIC package, and a version where the optical engine is integrated directly on the interposer. The implementation illustrated in the middle figure (b) will be the most common one used for scale-up and scale-out CPO for the next few years, but it still requires some form of serialized links that can pass through the ASIC substrate and will still require some form of SerDes on both sides. For example, UCIe-S could be used as a protocol for such transmission.

The implementation illustrated in the middle figure (b) will be the most common one used for scale-up and scale-out CPO for the next few years, but it still requires some form of serialized links that can pass through the ASIC substrate and will still require some form of SerDes on both sides. For example, UCIe-S could be used as a protocol for such transmission.

The implementation illustrated in the middle figure (b) will be the most common one used for scale-up and scale-out CPO for the next few years, but it still requires some form of serialized links that can pass through the ASIC substrate and will still require some form of SerDes on both sides. For example, UCIe-S could be used as a protocol for such transmission.

pro.text: OCI MSA还展示了不同的实现方案：一种是板载光学（OBO），另一种是通过基板集成在专用集成电路（ASIC）封装上的CPO版本，以及第三种将光学引擎直接集成在硅中介层上的版本。中间图（b）所示的实现方案，在未来几年内将是用于纵向与横向扩展CPO的最常见方案。不过，该方案仍需要某种形式的串行化链路来穿过ASIC基板，并且两端仍需要某种形式的串行器/解串器（SerDes）。例如，UCIe-S协议就可以用于此类传输。

paragraphs.source: The “Final Boss” when it comes to implementing CPO will be when the optical engine can be integrated onto the interposer itself, connecting to the ASIC using a parallelized die to die (D2D) connection as depicted in (c) above. This could considerably improve shoreline bandwidth density, enable much higher radix and improve energy efficiency. This implementation thus unlocks benefits of CPO in ways that the other implementations cannot, but achieving it is still a few years away and requires further improvements in advanced packaging technology.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The “Final Boss” when it comes to implementing CPO will be when the optical engine can be integrated onto the interposer itself, connecting to the ASIC using a parallelized die to die (D2D) connection as depicted in (c) above. This could considerably improve shoreline bandwidth density, enable much higher radix and improve energy efficiency. This implementation thus unlocks benefits of CPO in ways that the other implementations cannot, but achieving it is still a few years away and requires further improvements in advanced packaging technology.

This could considerably improve shoreline bandwidth density, enable much higher radix and improve energy efficiency. This implementation thus unlocks benefits of CPO in ways that the other implementations cannot, but achieving it is still a few years away and requires further improvements in advanced packaging technology.

pro.text: 实现共封装光学（CPO）的“终极挑战”，在于将光学引擎直接集成到硅中介层上，并如上图（c）所示，通过并行化的裸片到裸片（D2D）连接与专用集成电路（ASIC）相连。这有望显著提升海岸线带宽密度，实现更高的端口数（radix），并改善能效。因此，这种实现方案能以其他方案无法企及的方式释放CPO的优势。但要实现它，仍需数年时间，并依赖于先进封装技术的进一步发展。

issues.description: 关键术语“Coherent-lite”在段落内首次出现时，译文“精简相干（coherent-lite）”的注释格式与全文指南要求不符。
译文“因其衰减较低”的因果关系表述不够精确，可能削弱原文的技术逻辑。原文“for their low attenuation”是解释选择C波段的原因，译文“因其”虽正确，但结合上下文看，强调“低衰减”是C波段的核心优势，可以更突出。
关键术语“dual polarization QAM”在段落内首次出现时，译文“双偏振正交幅度调制（dual polarization QAM）”的注释格式正确，但“QAM”本身作为缩写，其全称“正交幅度调制”在文中是首次出现，按照指南精神，也应考虑加注。
译文“此次演示的关键在于，它强调了其他几种为园区应用优化的通道带宽扩展方法。”略显生硬，存在“抽象名词壳”（“关键在于”）和轻微的翻译腔（“为...优化的”）。
译文“这种调制方案对业界而言并非全新，但如今正被引入数据中心园区环境，用于那些更短的链路。”表达清晰准确，但“正被引入”是被动语态，且“用于那些”稍显口语化。

paragraphs.source: Marvell presented an 800G transceiver for coherent-lite applications. Traditional transceivers have a limit on how far they can reach, less than 10 kilometers. Coherent transceivers support much further reach, but they are complex, consume more power, and are more expensive. Marvell’s Coherent-lite transceiver targets a middle ground with respect to power consumption, cost and range, which is perfect for large datacenter campuses with links spanning at most tens of kilometers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Marvell presented an 800G transceiver for coherent-lite applications. Traditional transceivers have a limit on how far they can reach, less than 10 kilometers. Coherent transceivers support much further reach, but they are complex, consume more power, and are more expensive. Marvell’s Coherent-lite transceiver targets a middle ground with respect to power consumption, cost and range, which is perfect for large datacenter campuses with links spanning at most tens of kilometers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Marvell presented an 800G transceiver for coherent-lite applications. Traditional transceivers have a limit on how far they can reach, less than 10 kilometers. Coherent transceivers support much further reach, but they are complex, consume more power, and are more expensive. Marvell’s Coherent-lite transceiver targets a middle ground with respect to power consumption, cost and range, which is perfect for large datacenter campuses with links spanning at most tens of kilometers.

pro.text: Marvell 展示了一款用于精简相干（Coherent-Lite）应用的 800G 光模块。传统光模块的传输距离有限，通常小于 10 公里。相干光模块则支持远得多的距离，但其设计复杂、功耗更高且成本更昂贵。Marvell 的精简相干光模块旨在功耗、成本和传输距离之间取得平衡，这对于链路跨度最多数十公里的大型数据中心园区而言堪称完美。

issues.description: 关键术语“Coherent-lite”在段落内首次出现时，译文“精简相干（coherent-lite）”的注释格式与全文指南要求不符。
译文“因其衰减较低”的因果关系表述不够精确，可能削弱原文的技术逻辑。原文“for their low attenuation”是解释选择C波段的原因，译文“因其”虽正确，但结合上下文看，强调“低衰减”是C波段的核心优势，可以更突出。
关键术语“dual polarization QAM”在段落内首次出现时，译文“双偏振正交幅度调制（dual polarization QAM）”的注释格式正确，但“QAM”本身作为缩写，其全称“正交幅度调制”在文中是首次出现，按照指南精神，也应考虑加注。
译文“此次演示的关键在于，它强调了其他几种为园区应用优化的通道带宽扩展方法。”略显生硬，存在“抽象名词壳”（“关键在于”）和轻微的翻译腔（“为...优化的”）。
译文“这种调制方案对业界而言并非全新，但如今正被引入数据中心园区环境，用于那些更短的链路。”表达清晰准确，但“正被引入”是被动语态，且“用于那些”稍显口语化。

paragraphs.source: Coherent transceivers primarily use C-band wavelengths for their low attenuation. However, the long-haul links in which coherent transmission is used typically have a very high dispersion, needing heavy DSP processing. The long range of traditional Coherent optics can often be overkill for datacenter campuses with buildings that are only tens of kilometers apart.

However, the long-haul links in which coherent transmission is used typically have a very high dispersion, needing heavy DSP processing. The long range of traditional Coherent optics can often be overkill for datacenter campuses with buildings that are only tens of kilometers apart.

pro.text: 相干光模块主要使用C波段波长，正是看中其低衰减特性。然而，使用相干传输的长距离链路通常色散非常高，需要大量的数字信号处理器（DSP）处理。对于建筑物之间仅相隔数十公里的数据中心园区而言，传统相干光学的超长传输距离往往显得大材小用。

paragraphs.source: Coherent-Lite transceivers instead use O-band wavelengths, which have near-zero dispersion over the relatively short distances on a datacenter campus. This enables minimal DSP processing, saving power and reducing latency.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Coherent-Lite transceivers instead use O-band wavelengths, which have near-zero dispersion over the relatively short distances on a datacenter campus. This enables minimal DSP processing, saving power and reducing latency.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Coherent-Lite transceivers instead use O-band wavelengths, which have near-zero dispersion over the relatively short distances on a datacenter campus. This enables minimal DSP processing, saving power and reducing latency.

pro.text: 精简相干光模块则转而使用 O 波段波长，该波段在数据中心园区相对较短的距离上色散近乎为零。这使得所需的 DSP 处理降至最低，从而节省了功耗并降低了延迟。

paragraphs.source: The Coherent-lite transceiver is a DSP-based pluggable module consisting of two 400G channels. Each 400G channel runs a dual polarization QAM and consists of two parallel modulation streams, X and Y.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The Coherent-lite transceiver is a DSP-based pluggable module consisting of two 400G channels. Each 400G channel runs a dual polarization QAM and consists of two parallel modulation streams, X and Y.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The Coherent-lite transceiver is a DSP-based pluggable module consisting of two 400G channels. Each 400G channel runs a dual polarization QAM and consists of two parallel modulation streams, X and Y.

pro.text: 精简相干光模块是一种基于数字信号处理器（DSP）的可插拔模块，包含两个 400G 通道。每个 400G 通道运行双偏振正交幅度调制（Dual-Polarization Quadrature Amplitude Modulation, DP-QAM），并由 X 和 Y 两个并行的调制流组成。

issues.description: 关键术语“Coherent-lite”在段落内首次出现时，译文“精简相干（coherent-lite）”的注释格式与全文指南要求不符。
译文“因其衰减较低”的因果关系表述不够精确，可能削弱原文的技术逻辑。原文“for their low attenuation”是解释选择C波段的原因，译文“因其”虽正确，但结合上下文看，强调“低衰减”是C波段的核心优势，可以更突出。
关键术语“dual polarization QAM”在段落内首次出现时，译文“双偏振正交幅度调制（dual polarization QAM）”的注释格式正确，但“QAM”本身作为缩写，其全称“正交幅度调制”在文中是首次出现，按照指南精神，也应考虑加注。
译文“此次演示的关键在于，它强调了其他几种为园区应用优化的通道带宽扩展方法。”略显生硬，存在“抽象名词壳”（“关键在于”）和轻微的翻译腔（“为...优化的”）。
译文“这种调制方案对业界而言并非全新，但如今正被引入数据中心园区环境，用于那些更短的链路。”表达清晰准确，但“正被引入”是被动语态，且“用于那些”稍显口语化。

paragraphs.source: The key to this demonstration is highlighting other methods of scaling channel bandwidth that are optimized for the campus application.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The key to this demonstration is highlighting other methods of scaling channel bandwidth that are optimized for the campus application.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The key to this demonstration is highlighting other methods of scaling channel bandwidth that are optimized for the campus application.

pro.text: 本次演示的核心，在于展示其他几种专为园区应用优化的通道带宽扩展方法。

paragraphs.source: Higher-order modulation coupled with the dual polarization using X and Y axes delivers 400G channel bandwidth. There are 8 bits per channel for a total of 32 constellation points as demonstrated above. These 8 bits times the 62.5 GBd signal rate equals ~400G of total bandwidth.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Higher-order modulation coupled with the dual polarization using X and Y axes delivers 400G channel bandwidth. There are 8 bits per channel for a total of 32 constellation points as demonstrated above. These 8 bits times the 62.5 GBd signal rate equals ~400G of total bandwidth.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Higher-order modulation coupled with the dual polarization using X and Y axes delivers 400G channel bandwidth. There are 8 bits per channel for a total of 32 constellation points as demonstrated above. These 8 bits times the 62.5 GBd signal rate equals ~400G of total bandwidth.

pro.text: 高阶调制结合使用 X 和 Y 轴的双偏振技术，实现了 400G 的通道带宽。如上图所示，每个通道有 8 比特，总共构成 32 个星座点。这 8 比特乘以 62.5 GBd 的信号速率，总计约 400G 的总带宽。

paragraphs.source: This modulation scheme is not entirely new to the industry, but it is now being brought into the datacenter campus setting for use in those shorter links.

pro.text: 这种调制方案对业界来说并不陌生，但如今正被引入数据中心园区，用于那些距离较短的链路。

paragraphs.source: Marvell’s approach significantly reduces power to only 3.72 pJ/b excluding silicon photonics, half of other full-fledged coherent transceivers. Their measurements were taken over a fiber length of 40km, with a latency of less than 300 ns.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Marvell’s approach significantly reduces power to only 3.72 pJ/b excluding silicon photonics, half of other full-fledged coherent transceivers. Their measurements were taken over a fiber length of 40km, with a latency of less than 300 ns.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Marvell’s approach significantly reduces power to only 3.72 pJ/b excluding silicon photonics, half of other full-fledged coherent transceivers. Their measurements were taken over a fiber length of 40km, with a latency of less than 300 ns.

pro.text: Marvell 的方案显著降低了功耗，在不包含硅光部分的情况下，功耗仅为 3.72 皮焦耳/比特，仅为其他全功能相干收发器的一半。其测量是在 40 公里光纤长度上进行的，延迟低于 300 纳秒。

issues.description: 术语首次出现时，英文缩写与中文全称的对应关系可以更清晰。
句子拆分后，主语指代略显模糊，且“进行了测试”结构稍显翻译腔。
“采用台积电 N7 工艺制造”这个状语的位置，使其修饰对象（是整个封装还是每个引擎？）在中文中产生轻微歧义。
“有前景的结果”这个译法稍显平淡，未能完全传达原文在展示具体数据前所营造的期待感。

issues.description: 术语首次出现时，英文缩写与中文全称的对应关系可以更清晰。
句子拆分后，主语指代略显模糊，且“进行了测试”结构稍显翻译腔。
“采用台积电 N7 工艺制造”这个状语的位置，使其修饰对象（是整个封装还是每个引擎？）在中文中产生轻微歧义。
“有前景的结果”这个译法稍显平淡，未能完全传达原文在展示具体数据前所营造的期待感。

paragraphs.source: Broadcom showcased progress on their 6.4T MZM optical engine (OE) consisting of 64 lanes of ~100G using PAM4 modulation. The optical engines were tested in a Tomahawk 5 51.2T CPO system. One CPO package consists of eight 6.4T OEs, each with a PIC and an EIC, on TSMC’s N7 process.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Broadcom showcased progress on their 6.4T MZM optical engine (OE) consisting of 64 lanes of ~100G using PAM4 modulation. The optical engines were tested in a Tomahawk 5 51.2T CPO system. One CPO package consists of eight 6.4T OEs, each with a PIC and an EIC, on TSMC’s N7 process.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Broadcom showcased progress on their 6.4T MZM optical engine (OE) consisting of 64 lanes of ~100G using PAM4 modulation. The optical engines were tested in a Tomahawk 5 51.2T CPO system. One CPO package consists of eight 6.4T OEs, each with a PIC and an EIC, on TSMC’s N7 process.

pro.text: 博通展示了其 6.4T MZM（马赫-曾德尔调制器）光学引擎的进展。该光学引擎由 64 条通道组成，每条通道速率约 100G，采用 PAM4（四电平脉冲幅度调制）调制。这些光学引擎在 Tomahawk 5 51.2T CPO（共封装光学）系统中进行了测试。一个 CPO 封装包含八个 6.4T 光学引擎，每个引擎均由一个光子集成电路和一个电子集成电路组成，采用台积电 N7 工艺制造。

paragraphs.source: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.

pro.text: 随着多裸片设计成为常态，裸片间互连已成为关键瓶颈。各大晶圆代工厂和芯片设计公司提出了多种方案，力求在有机基板和先进封装技术上同时提升带宽密度与能效。

issues.description: 译文句式略显生硬，存在‘在...上’和‘通过...’的并列结构，可以优化得更流畅。

paragraphs.source: Intel presented their UCIe-S compatible die-to-die (D2D) interface. It can reach up to 48 Gb/s/lane over 16 lanes with UCIe-S and up to 56 Gb/s/lane with a custom protocol. It works on a standard organic package for a distance of up to 30mm. Interestingly, it was manufactured on Intel’s 22nm process.

paragraphs.source: At VLSI 2025, Cadence demonstrated their own UCIe-S die-to-die interconnect on N3E. Despite the node disadvantage, Intel has managed to best Cadence’s interconnect in data rate, channel length and shoreline bandwidth, only losing out in energy efficiency.

paragraphs.source: The interconnect presented by Intel is likely to be a prototype of what will be used on their Diamond Rapids Xeon CPUs. Efficiency should be much better when designed on the Intel 3 process compared to this 22nm test chip and could serve to replace the advanced packaging approaches like EMIB on Granite Rapids. As we have covered in our article on the Landscape of Datacenter CPUs, Diamond Rapids consists of two IMH dies, and 4 CBB dies. With the long traces between each CBB die to both IMH dies, we believe this link is a viable candidate to connect the dies over standard package substrate, negating the need for EMIB.

inline_elements.text: covered in our article on the Landscape of Datacenter CPUs

issues.description: 术语首次出现时，中文译名与后续使用不一致。
对‘UCIe-like’的翻译处理可能导致关键的技术区别信息被弱化。
关键术语‘Edge-Triggered Transceiver (ETT)’的翻译在段落内不一致。
译文‘不仅避免了因桥接芯片存在而损害电源网格，反而能同时优化...’逻辑连接词‘不仅...反而...’使用稍显生硬，且‘损害电源网格’的表述可以更技术化。
专业术语‘shoreline’的翻译‘海岸线’虽然形象，但在中文半导体封装语境中，更常见的对应术语是‘接口宽度’或‘互连接口宽度’。
‘阐述了...如何在多个阶段进行测试’是典型的‘进行...操作’翻译腔结构。
将‘Interestingly’译为‘有趣的是’是合适的，但后半句‘值得注意的是...’的添加略微改变了原文的节奏和焦点。

paragraphs.source: TSMC’s advanced packaging division presented their Active Local Silicon Interconnect (aLSI) solution. As opposed to standard CoWoS-L or EMIB, aLSI improves signal integrity and reduces the complexity of PHYs and SerDes on the top dies.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC’s advanced packaging division presented their Active Local Silicon Interconnect (aLSI) solution. As opposed to standard CoWoS-L or EMIB, aLSI improves signal integrity and reduces the complexity of PHYs and SerDes on the top dies.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC’s advanced packaging division presented their Active Local Silicon Interconnect (aLSI) solution. As opposed to standard CoWoS-L or EMIB, aLSI improves signal integrity and reduces the complexity of PHYs and SerDes on the top dies.

pro.text: 台积电（TSMC）的先进封装部门展示了其有源本地硅互连（Active Local Silicon Interconnect, aLSI）方案。与标准的CoWoS-L或EMIB不同，aLSI改善了信号完整性，并降低了顶层裸片上物理层（PHY）和串行器/解串器（SerDes）的复杂度。

paragraphs.source: The device that TSMC showed used a 32 Gb/s UCIe-like transceiver. Due to aLSI improving signal integrity, the area of the transceivers could be decreased, and the bump pitch could also be reduced from 45 µm to 38.8 µm. The combination of a tighter pitch and a switch to a Manhattan grid allowed them to reduce the PHY depth from 1043 µm to 850 µm, saving space that designers can reallocate to compute, memory, or IO, or use to shrink the die. The transceiver is only UCIe-like and not true UCIe, as UCIe mandates a hexagonal bump map rather than the Manhattan grid used here.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The device that TSMC showed used a 32 Gb/s UCIe-like transceiver. Due to aLSI improving signal integrity, the area of the transceivers could be decreased, and the bump pitch could also be reduced from 45 µm to 38.8 µm. The combination of a tighter pitch and a switch to a Manhattan grid allowed them to reduce the PHY depth from 1043 µm to 850 µm, saving space that designers can reallocate to compute, memory, or IO, or use to shrink the die. The transceiver is only UCIe-like and not true UCIe, as UCIe mandates a hexagonal bump map rather than the Manhattan grid used here.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The device that TSMC showed used a 32 Gb/s UCIe-like transceiver. Due to aLSI improving signal integrity, the area of the transceivers could be decreased, and the bump pitch could also be reduced from 45 µm to 38.8 µm. The combination of a tighter pitch and a switch to a Manhattan grid allowed them to reduce the PHY depth from 1043 µm to 850 µm, saving space that designers can reallocate to compute, memory, or IO, or use to shrink the die. The transceiver is only UCIe-like and not true UCIe, as UCIe mandates a hexagonal bump map rather than the Manhattan grid used here.

pro.text: 台积电展示的器件采用了32 Gb/s、类似UCIe的收发器。由于aLSI改善了信号完整性，收发器的面积得以减小，凸点间距也能从45微米缩减至38.8微米。更紧密的间距结合转向曼哈顿网格（Manhattan grid）的布局，使得物理层（PHY）的深度从1043微米降至850微米，从而节省了空间。设计者可将这些空间重新分配给计算、内存或输入/输出（IO）单元，或用于缩小裸片尺寸。需要指出的是，该收发器只是“类似UCIe”，并非真正的UCIe标准实现，因为UCIe标准强制要求六边形凸点排布，而非此处使用的曼哈顿网格。

paragraphs.source: The ‘active’ part of aLSI comes from replacing the passive long-reach metal channel in the bridge die with active transistors forming an Edge-Triggered Transceiver (ETT) circuit to maintain signal integrity over longer reaches. This also reduces the signal driving requirements of the top die’s Transmit/Receive ports. ETT circuits within the aLSI only add an additional 0.07pJ/b to the energy cost, minimizing thermal concerns from adding active circuits in stacked dies. By moving the signal conditioning circuits to the bridge die, PHY area on the top die TX/RX can be reduced by using smaller pre-drivers and clock buffers and remove the need for signal amplification on the receive end.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The ‘active’ part of aLSI comes from replacing the passive long-reach metal channel in the bridge die with active transistors forming an Edge-Triggered Transceiver (ETT) circuit to maintain signal integrity over longer reaches. This also reduces the signal driving requirements of the top die’s Transmit/Receive ports. ETT circuits within the aLSI only add an additional 0.07pJ/b to the energy cost, minimizing thermal concerns from adding active circuits in stacked dies. By moving the signal conditioning circuits to the bridge die, PHY area on the top die TX/RX can be reduced by using smaller pre-drivers and clock buffers and remove the need for signal amplification on the receive end.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The ‘active’ part of aLSI comes from replacing the passive long-reach metal channel in the bridge die with active transistors forming an Edge-Triggered Transceiver (ETT) circuit to maintain signal integrity over longer reaches. This also reduces the signal driving requirements of the top die’s Transmit/Receive ports. ETT circuits within the aLSI only add an additional 0.07pJ/b to the energy cost, minimizing thermal concerns from adding active circuits in stacked dies. By moving the signal conditioning circuits to the bridge die, PHY area on the top die TX/RX can be reduced by using smaller pre-drivers and clock buffers and remove the need for signal amplification on the receive end.

pro.text: aLSI的‘有源’部分，体现在用有源晶体管构成的边沿触发收发器（Edge-Triggered Transceiver, ETT）电路，取代了桥接裸片中的无源长距离金属通道，从而在更长距离上维持信号完整性。这也降低了对顶层裸片发送/接收端口信号驱动能力的要求。aLSI内部的ETT电路仅额外增加0.07皮焦/比特（pJ/b）的能耗，最大限度地缓解了在堆叠裸片中加入有源电路可能引发的散热担忧。通过将信号调理电路移至桥接裸片，顶层裸片的发送/接收物理层（PHY）面积得以减小，这得益于可以使用更小的预驱动器和时钟缓冲器，并且接收端不再需要信号放大。

paragraphs.source: The ETT integrates a driver, an AC-coupling capacitor (Cac), an amplifier with both negative and positive feedback, and an output stage. Running the signal through the Cac introduces peaks in the signal transition edges, which is then picked up by the dual-loop amplifier, hence the edge-triggered nomenclature. The amplifier leverages both positive and negative feedback loops to stabilize the voltage level. In this design, Cac is set to be 180 fF for a 1.7 mm channel length, with 2kΩ resistance on die A and 3kΩ on die B respectively.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The ETT integrates a driver, an AC-coupling capacitor (Cac), an amplifier with both negative and positive feedback, and an output stage. Running the signal through the Cac introduces peaks in the signal transition edges, which is then picked up by the dual-loop amplifier, hence the edge-triggered nomenclature. The amplifier leverages both positive and negative feedback loops to stabilize the voltage level. In this design, Cac is set to be 180 fF for a 1.7 mm channel length, with 2kΩ resistance on die A and 3kΩ on die B respectively.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The ETT integrates a driver, an AC-coupling capacitor (Cac), an amplifier with both negative and positive feedback, and an output stage. Running the signal through the Cac introduces peaks in the signal transition edges, which is then picked up by the dual-loop amplifier, hence the edge-triggered nomenclature. The amplifier leverages both positive and negative feedback loops to stabilize the voltage level. In this design, Cac is set to be 180 fF for a 1.7 mm channel length, with 2kΩ resistance on die A and 3kΩ on die B respectively.

pro.text: 边沿触发收发器（ETT）集成了驱动器、交流耦合电容（Cac）、一个兼具负反馈与正反馈的放大器以及输出级。信号通过Cac时，会在其转换边沿引入峰值，随后由双环路放大器拾取，这便是其‘边沿触发’名称的由来。该放大器利用正负反馈环路来稳定电压水平。在此设计中，针对1.7毫米的通道长度，Cac设定为180 fF，裸片A和裸片B上的电阻分别为2kΩ和3kΩ。

paragraphs.source: These aLSI bridges can also integrate embedded deep trench capacitors (eDTC) along the front-end to improve power delivery to the PHY and D2D controllers. Instead of compromising the power grid by having a bridge die in the way, aLSI with eDTC improves both the power and signal routing along the D2D interfaces.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These aLSI bridges can also integrate embedded deep trench capacitors (eDTC) along the front-end to improve power delivery to the PHY and D2D controllers. Instead of compromising the power grid by having a bridge die in the way, aLSI with eDTC improves both the power and signal routing along the D2D interfaces.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These aLSI bridges can also integrate embedded deep trench capacitors (eDTC) along the front-end to improve power delivery to the PHY and D2D controllers. Instead of compromising the power grid by having a bridge die in the way, aLSI with eDTC improves both the power and signal routing along the D2D interfaces.

pro.text: 这些aLSI桥接芯片还能在前端集成嵌入式深沟槽电容（eDTC），以改善对物理层（PHY）和裸片到裸片（D2D）控制器的供电。aLSI配合eDTC技术，不仅没有因为桥接芯片的存在而损害电源配送网络，反而能同时优化沿D2D接口的供电与信号布线。

paragraphs.source: Only 388 µm of shoreline is required for 64 TX and 64 RX data lanes, coming out to a total area of 0.330 mm². Only the top 2 metal layers are required for routing the signals. The remaining metal layers can be used for the front-end circuitry.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Only 388 µm of shoreline is required for 64 TX and 64 RX data lanes, coming out to a total area of 0.330 mm². Only the top 2 metal layers are required for routing the signals. The remaining metal layers can be used for the front-end circuitry.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Only 388 µm of shoreline is required for 64 TX and 64 RX data lanes, coming out to a total area of 0.330 mm². Only the top 2 metal layers are required for routing the signals. The remaining metal layers can be used for the front-end circuitry.

pro.text: 仅需388微米的互连接口宽度，即可容纳64条发送（TX）和64条接收（RX）数据通道，总面积仅为0.330平方毫米。信号布线仅需占用最顶部的两层金属层，其余金属层可用于前端电路。

paragraphs.source: TSMC explained how the Active LSI can be tested at multiple stages. The first is Known Good Die (KGD) with just the LSI for die validation. Next is Known Good Stack (KGS) with the SoCs connected by the LSI for stack functionality. Lastly is Known Good Package (KGP) with the full assembly to comprehensively verify functionality, performance and reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC explained how the Active LSI can be tested at multiple stages. The first is Known Good Die (KGD) with just the LSI for die validation. Next is Known Good Stack (KGS) with the SoCs connected by the LSI for stack functionality. Lastly is Known Good Package (KGP) with the full assembly to comprehensively verify functionality, performance and reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC explained how the Active LSI can be tested at multiple stages. The first is Known Good Die (KGD) with just the LSI for die validation. Next is Known Good Stack (KGS) with the SoCs connected by the LSI for stack functionality. Lastly is Known Good Package (KGP) with the full assembly to comprehensively verify functionality, performance and reliability.

pro.text: 台积电介绍了有源本地硅互连（aLSI）的多阶段测试方案。首先是已知合格裸片（KGD）阶段，仅测试LSI裸片本身以进行裸片验证。其次是已知合格堆叠（KGS）阶段，此时系统级芯片（SoC）已通过LSI连接，以测试堆叠功能。最后是已知合格封装（KGP）阶段，对完整组装体进行全面测试，以验证其功能、性能和可靠性。

paragraphs.source: They showed shmoo plots at the KGD and KGP stages, both showing the interconnect hitting 32 Gb/s at 0.75V and 38.4 Gb/s at 0.95V.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: They showed shmoo plots at the KGD and KGP stages, both showing the interconnect hitting 32 Gb/s at 0.75V and 38.4 Gb/s at 0.95V.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: They showed shmoo plots at the KGD and KGP stages, both showing the interconnect hitting 32 Gb/s at 0.75V and 38.4 Gb/s at 0.95V.

pro.text: 他们展示了在KGD和KGP阶段的舒姆图。两张图均显示，该互连技术在0.75V电压下达到了32 Gb/s的速度，在0.95V电压下则达到了38.4 Gb/s。

paragraphs.source: The package reveals two SoC dies and two IO dies. Interestingly, the test vehicle appears to match AMD’s MI450 GPU’s design, with 2 base dies connected to each other, 12 HBM4 stacks and 2 IO dies with Active LSI. Instead of each individual HBM4 stack having its own Active LSI, two HBM4 stacks share one.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The package reveals two SoC dies and two IO dies. Interestingly, the test vehicle appears to match AMD’s MI450 GPU’s design, with 2 base dies connected to each other, 12 HBM4 stacks and 2 IO dies with Active LSI. Instead of each individual HBM4 stack having its own Active LSI, two HBM4 stacks share one.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The package reveals two SoC dies and two IO dies. Interestingly, the test vehicle appears to match AMD’s MI450 GPU’s design, with 2 base dies connected to each other, 12 HBM4 stacks and 2 IO dies with Active LSI. Instead of each individual HBM4 stack having its own Active LSI, two HBM4 stacks share one.

pro.text: 该封装体展示了两颗系统级芯片（SoC）裸片和两颗输入/输出（IO）裸片。有趣的是，这个测试载具的设计似乎与AMD的MI450图形处理器（GPU）相符，包含两颗相互连接的基础裸片、12个HBM4堆栈以及两颗集成有源本地硅互连（aLSI）的IO裸片。其特点是，并非每个HBM4堆栈都拥有独立的aLSI，而是每两个共享一个。

‘阐述了...如何在多个阶段进行测试’是典型的‘进行...操作’翻译腔结构。
将‘Interestingly’译为‘有趣的是’是合适的，但后半句‘值得注意的是...’的添加略微改变了原文的节奏和焦点。

paragraphs.source: As for the power, the total is only 0.36 pJ/b at 0.75V, with only 0.07 pJ/b being used by the ETT in the Active LSI. Below is a comparison with other D2D solutions.

pro.text: 在功耗方面，在0.75V电压下，总功耗仅为0.36皮焦耳/比特（pJ/b），其中有源本地硅互连（aLSI）中的嵌入式硅桥（ETT）部分仅消耗0.07 pJ/b。下图是与其他裸片到裸片（D2D）解决方案的对比。

issues.description: 术语“die-to-die”在段落2和段落8中翻译不一致。
译文“设计中还包含了完整的供电网络和布线模拟，以模拟时钟门控和串扰效应。”略显生硬，且“模拟”一词重复使用。
“shoreline”在此处是芯片设计领域的专业术语，译为“海岸线长度”可能不够准确或对部分读者造成理解障碍。
译文“该测试载具采用台积电（TSMC）的N3P制程节点制造。互连模块在两种数据速率下进行了测试：0.65V电压下为20 Gb/s，0.75V电压下为24 Gb/s。” 将原文一句拆为两句，信息清晰，但第二句的表述可以更紧凑。
术语“idle state”译为“空闲状态”是准确的，但考虑到上下文（功耗分析），在半导体/电路设计中更常见的对应术语是“静态功耗”或“待机状态”所对应的状态。
译文“与台积电（TSMC）为其Active LSI所做的一样，微软也将自家的互连技术与先前相同的研究进行了对比。” 语序调整后符合中文习惯，但“先前相同的研究”略显拗口。

pro.tokenized_text: [[[EM_1|微软（Microsoft）裸片到裸片（D2D）测试载具布局与布线。来源：微软，ISSCC 2026]]]

issues.description: 术语“die-to-die”在段落2和段落8中翻译不一致。

译文“该测试载具采用台积电（TSMC）的N3P制程节点制造。互连模块在两种数据速率下进行了测试：0.65V电压下为20 Gb/s，0.75V电压下为24 Gb/s。” 将原文一句拆为两句，信息清晰，但第二句的表述可以更紧凑。
术语“idle state”译为“空闲状态”是准确的，但考虑到上下文（功耗分析），在半导体/电路设计中更常见的对应术语是“静态功耗”或“待机状态”所对应的状态。
译文“与台积电（TSMC）为其Active LSI所做的一样，微软也将自家的互连技术与先前相同的研究进行了对比。” 语序调整后符合中文习惯，但“先前相同的研究”略显拗口。

paragraphs.source: Microsoft also detailed their die-to-die (D2D) interconnect. Their test vehicle includes two dies and two pairs of D2D nodes for interconnection. A full mock-up of the power delivery network and routing were included to mimic clock gating and crosstalk.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Microsoft also detailed their die-to-die (D2D) interconnect. Their test vehicle includes two dies and two pairs of D2D nodes for interconnection. A full mock-up of the power delivery network and routing were included to mimic clock gating and crosstalk.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Microsoft also detailed their die-to-die (D2D) interconnect. Their test vehicle includes two dies and two pairs of D2D nodes for interconnection. A full mock-up of the power delivery network and routing were included to mimic clock gating and crosstalk.

pro.text: 微软也详细介绍了其裸片到裸片（D2D）互连技术。其测试载具包含两颗裸片和两对用于互连的D2D节点。为了模拟时钟门控和串扰效应，设计中还包含了完整的供电网络和布线模型。

paragraphs.source: The interconnect on their test die occupied 532 µm of shoreline and had a depth of 1350 µm. The test vehicle was fabricated on TSMC’s N3P node, and the interconnect was tested at two data rates, 20 Gb/s at 0.65V, and 24 Gb/s at 0.75V.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The interconnect on their test die occupied 532 µm of shoreline and had a depth of 1350 µm. The test vehicle was fabricated on TSMC’s N3P node, and the interconnect was tested at two data rates, 20 Gb/s at 0.65V, and 24 Gb/s at 0.75V.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The interconnect on their test die occupied 532 µm of shoreline and had a depth of 1350 µm. The test vehicle was fabricated on TSMC’s N3P node, and the interconnect was tested at two data rates, 20 Gb/s at 0.65V, and 24 Gb/s at 0.75V.

pro.text: 其测试芯片上的互连模块占据了532微米的芯片边缘长度，深度为1350微米。该测试载具采用台积电（TSMC）的N3P制程节点制造，互连模块在两种数据速率下进行了测试：0.65V电压下为20 Gb/s，0.75V电压下为24 Gb/s。

paragraphs.source: Microsoft reported two power consumption figures, one with both analog and digital system power, and one with only analog power. The latter is what most die-to-die interconnects report. At 24 Gb/s, the system power is 0.33 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.226 pJ/b, while at 20 Gb/s, the system power is 0.25 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.17 pJ/b. The power at idle state is 0.05 pJ/b.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Microsoft reported two power consumption figures, one with both analog and digital system power, and one with only analog power. The latter is what most die-to-die interconnects report. At 24 Gb/s, the system power is 0.33 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.226 pJ/b, while at 20 Gb/s, the system power is 0.25 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.17 pJ/b. The power at idle state is 0.05 pJ/b.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Microsoft reported two power consumption figures, one with both analog and digital system power, and one with only analog power. The latter is what most die-to-die interconnects report. At 24 Gb/s, the system power is 0.33 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.226 pJ/b, while at 20 Gb/s, the system power is 0.25 pJ/b and the analog power is 0.17 pJ/b. The power at idle state is 0.05 pJ/b.

pro.text: 微软（Microsoft）报告了两个功耗数据：一个包含模拟和数字系统的总功耗，另一个则仅包含模拟功耗。后者是大多数裸片间互连（die-to-die interconnects）通常报告的指标。在24 Gb/s速率下，系统总功耗为0.33皮焦耳/比特（pJ/b），模拟功耗为0.226 pJ/b；而在20 Gb/s速率下，系统总功耗为0.25 pJ/b，模拟功耗为0.17 pJ/b。其静态状态下的功耗为0.05 pJ/b。

paragraphs.source: As we explained in a previous article, Microsoft’s Cobalt 200 CPU features two compute chiplets connected by a custom high-bandwidth interconnect. We believe that this presentation details that exact interconnect.

inline_elements.text: explained in a previous article

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As we [explained in a previous article](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/i/187132686/microsoft-cobalt-200), Microsoft’s Cobalt 200 CPU features two compute chiplets connected by a custom high-bandwidth interconnect. We believe that this presentation details that exact interconnect.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As we explained in a previous article, Microsoft’s Cobalt 200 CPU features two compute chiplets connected by a custom high-bandwidth interconnect. We believe that this presentation details that exact interconnect.

parent_inline_elements.text: explained in a previous article

pro.text: 正如我们在之前的文章中所解释的，微软的Cobalt 200 CPU（中央处理器）采用了两个通过定制高带宽（high-bandwidth）互连连接的计算芯粒（compute chiplets）。我们认为，本次演讲详细阐述的正是这一具体的互连技术。
pro.tokenized_text: 正如我们[[[LINK_1|在之前的文章中所解释的]]]，微软的Cobalt 200 CPU（中央处理器）采用了两个通过定制高带宽（high-bandwidth）互连连接的计算芯粒（compute chiplets）。我们认为，本次演讲详细阐述的正是这一具体的互连技术。

paragraphs.source: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: From small mobile CPUs to large AI accelerators, ISSCC featured first-time architectural breakdowns from MediaTek, Intel, AMD, Rebellions, and Microsoft. Many even included die shots.

pro.text: 从移动端的小型CPU（中央处理器）到大型AI（人工智能）加速器，本届ISSCC（国际固态电路会议）首次披露了来自联发科（MediaTek）、英特尔（Intel）、AMD、Rebellions和微软（Microsoft）的多款产品的架构细节。其中许多甚至提供了芯片裸片（die）照片。

issues.description: “芯片裸片（die）照片”的表述略显冗余，可更简洁。

paragraphs.source: Every year, MediaTek presents a different aspect of their flagship mobile CPUs. This year is no different, and the focus of this year’s mobile CPU presentation was on boosting and thermal management.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Every year, MediaTek presents a different aspect of their flagship mobile CPUs. This year is no different, and the focus of this year’s mobile CPU presentation was on boosting and thermal management.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Every year, MediaTek presents a different aspect of their flagship mobile CPUs. This year is no different, and the focus of this year’s mobile CPU presentation was on boosting and thermal management.

pro.text: 联发科每年都会展示其旗舰移动CPU（中央处理器）的不同方面。今年也不例外，其移动CPU演示的重点在于性能提升与热管理。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致且注释时机不当。
‘侧面’一词略显抽象，可优化为更具体、更符合中文科技报道习惯的表达。
术语首次出现时，中文译名与英文全称的对应关系不够清晰。
‘面临着...的问题’结构稍显翻译腔，可优化为更简洁直接的表达。
‘旨在提升能效’中的‘旨在’略显书面化，且与前半句的因果关系连接可以更紧密。
技术性能对比的表述可以更紧凑，信息密度更高。
‘重点阐述了通过...来实现...’的句式略显冗长，可以调整语序使其更直接。
工艺节点术语翻译不一致，且可能引起歧义。

paragraphs.source: TSMC offers two different Contacted Gate Pitch (CGP) options for N3E and N3P, 48nm and 54nm. Across most chips, the narrower CGP of 48nm has been used, as it leads to smaller cell sizes and a greater die shrink. However, it also faces problems with leakage, routing and manufacturing due to the smaller critical dimensions.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC offers two different Contacted Gate Pitch (CGP) options for N3E and N3P, 48nm and 54nm. Across most chips, the narrower CGP of 48nm has been used, as it leads to smaller cell sizes and a greater die shrink. However, it also faces problems with leakage, routing and manufacturing due to the smaller critical dimensions.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC offers two different Contacted Gate Pitch (CGP) options for N3E and N3P, 48nm and 54nm. Across most chips, the narrower CGP of 48nm has been used, as it leads to smaller cell sizes and a greater die shrink. However, it also faces problems with leakage, routing and manufacturing due to the smaller critical dimensions.

pro.text: 台积电为其N3E和N3P工艺提供了两种不同的接触栅极间距（Contacted Gate Pitch, CGP）选项：48纳米和54纳米。在大多数芯片中，都采用了更窄的48纳米CGP，因为这能带来更小的单元尺寸和更大的芯片面积缩减。然而，由于关键尺寸更小，它也会带来漏电、布线和制造方面的问题。

paragraphs.source: MediaTek used the larger 54nm CGP on their Dimensity 9500’s C1 Ultra high-performance cores, for the improved power efficiency. This allowed them to reach higher performance with less thermal penalty, with 4.6% more performance at iso-leakage or 3% less power at iso-performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: MediaTek used the larger 54nm CGP on their Dimensity 9500’s C1 Ultra high-performance cores, for the improved power efficiency. This allowed them to reach higher performance with less thermal penalty, with 4.6% more performance at iso-leakage or 3% less power at iso-performance.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: MediaTek used the larger 54nm CGP on their Dimensity 9500’s C1 Ultra high-performance cores, for the improved power efficiency. This allowed them to reach higher performance with less thermal penalty, with 4.6% more performance at iso-leakage or 3% less power at iso-performance.

pro.text: 联发科在其天玑9500的C1 Ultra高性能核心上采用了更大的54纳米CGP，以提升能效。这使其能在更低的热量惩罚下达到更高性能，具体表现为同漏电下性能提升4.6%，或同性能下功耗降低3%。

paragraphs.source: The rest of MediaTek’s paper focuses on dynamic performance optimization by utilizing unused aging budget and reducing thermal overshoots. In total, they were able to increase boost clocks from 4.21 GHz to 4.4 GHz. If these optimizations sound interesting to you, we recommend you check out the paper, 10.2 A Dynamic Performance Augmentation in a 3nm-Plus Mobile CPU.

pro.text: 联发科论文的其余部分重点阐述了如何利用未使用的老化余量和减少热过冲，来实现动态性能优化。总体而言，他们成功将提升时钟频率从4.21 GHz提高到了4.4 GHz。如果您对这些优化技术感兴趣，我们推荐您查阅这篇论文：10.2 一款基于3nm-Plus工艺的移动CPU中的动态性能增强技术。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致且略显生硬。原文中“tiles”在同一段落内被译为“单元”，但“mesh tiles”和“DNN accelerator tiles”的翻译未完全统一，且“网格单元”和“核心单元”的表述在中文语境下不够清晰。
译文“通过 Foveros Direct 技术进行键合，这是一种间距为 9 微米的混合键合方案。”略显冗长，且“进行键合”是典型的翻译腔。
译文“SRAM（静态随机存取存储器）在两个芯片之间共享。”存在轻微歧义。原文“shared across both dies”更强调SRAM资源在上下两个芯片（die）构成的整体中是共享的，而非简单的“之间”连接。
译文“能将延迟降低，并将吞吐量提升近40%”中的“能将”和“并将”稍显书面化，可以更直接有力。
术语“HBI”在译文中首次出现时未加注英文全称，且中文翻译“混合键合互连”在上下文中略显突兀，因为前文已多次出现“混合键合”。

译文逻辑关系存在模糊和可能的误译。原文结构是：CWF使用Foveros Direct做某事（disaggregate...），具体方式是（with...）。译文“将 CPU 核心集群的 L2 缓存与基础芯片上的 L3 缓存解耦，每个顶部芯片包含6个集群，每个集群提供 35GB/s 带宽，总计每个顶部芯片为 210GB/s。”将“with”引导的细节（6集群，每集群35GB/s）处理为对“解耦”结果的补充说明，但原文更可能是指“通过（利用）每个顶部芯片上的6个集群（每个35GB/s）来实现与基础L3的解耦”。译文未明确表达出这35GB/s/集群的带宽是用于连接L2和L3的互连带宽，而非L2缓存本身的带宽。
译文“即每个连接在更小的面积上提供了 15.6GB/s 的带宽。”信息准确，但“在更小的面积上”这个比较对象（比什么小？）在中文中稍显突兀，因为前句未明确提及CWF连接的面积。

paragraphs.source: Intel disclosed their first hybrid bonded chip, the M3DProc. It consists of an Intel 3 bottom die, and an 18A top die. Each die contains 56 mesh tiles, cores and DNN accelerator tiles, respectively. The two dies are bonded together with Foveros Direct, hybrid bonding at a 9μm pitch.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Intel disclosed their first hybrid bonded chip, the M3DProc. It consists of an Intel 3 bottom die, and an 18A top die. Each die contains 56 mesh tiles, cores and DNN accelerator tiles, respectively. The two dies are bonded together with Foveros Direct, hybrid bonding at a 9μm pitch.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Intel disclosed their first hybrid bonded chip, the M3DProc. It consists of an Intel 3 bottom die, and an 18A top die. Each die contains 56 mesh tiles, cores and DNN accelerator tiles, respectively. The two dies are bonded together with Foveros Direct, hybrid bonding at a 9μm pitch.

pro.text: 英特尔首次披露了其采用混合键合技术的芯片 M3DProc。该芯片由一个英特尔 3 工艺的底层芯片和一个 18A 工艺的顶层芯片构成。每个芯片分别包含 56 个网格瓦片（mesh tile）、核心和深度神经网络（DNN）加速器瓦片。两个芯片通过间距为 9 微米的 Foveros Direct 混合键合技术互联。

译文逻辑关系存在模糊和可能的误译。原文结构是：CWF使用Foveros Direct做某事（disaggregate...），具体方式是（with...）。译文“将 CPU 核心集群的 L2 缓存与基础芯片上的 L3 缓存解耦，每个顶部芯片包含6个集群，每个集群提供 35GB/s 带宽，总计每个顶部芯片为 210GB/s。”将“with”引导的细节（6集群，每集群35GB/s）处理为对“解耦”结果的补充说明，但原文更可能是指“通过（利用）每个顶部芯片上的6个集群（每个35GB/s）来实现与基础L3的解耦”。译文未明确表达出这35GB/s/集群的带宽是用于连接L2和L3的互连带宽，而非L2缓存本身的带宽。
译文“即每个连接在更小的面积上提供了 15.6GB/s 的带宽。”信息准确，但“在更小的面积上”这个比较对象（比什么小？）在中文中稍显突兀，因为前句未明确提及CWF连接的面积。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致且略显生硬。原文中“tiles”在同一段落内被译为“单元”，但“mesh tiles”和“DNN accelerator tiles”的翻译未完全统一，且“网格单元”和“核心单元”的表述在中文语境下不够清晰。
译文“通过 Foveros Direct 技术进行键合，这是一种间距为 9 微米的混合键合方案。”略显冗长，且“进行键合”是典型的翻译腔。
译文“SRAM（静态随机存取存储器）在两个芯片之间共享。”存在轻微歧义。原文“shared across both dies”更强调SRAM资源在上下两个芯片（die）构成的整体中是共享的，而非简单的“之间”连接。
译文“能将延迟降低，并将吞吐量提升近40%”中的“能将”和“并将”稍显书面化，可以更直接有力。
术语“HBI”在译文中首次出现时未加注英文全称，且中文翻译“混合键合互连”在上下文中略显突兀，因为前文已多次出现“混合键合”。

译文“即每个连接在更小的面积上提供了 15.6GB/s 的带宽。”信息准确，但“在更小的面积上”这个比较对象（比什么小？）在中文中稍显突兀，因为前句未明确提及CWF连接的面积。

paragraphs.source: Intel found that the 3D mesh reduces latency and increases throughput by almost 40%. They also tested the energy efficiency of transferring data, with 2D being within the 56 mesh tiles of the bottom die, and 3D being 28 adjacent mesh tiles across both dies. The results show that the Hybrid Bonding Interconnect (HBI) had a negligible impact on efficiency.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Intel found that the 3D mesh reduces latency and increases throughput by almost 40%. They also tested the energy efficiency of transferring data, with 2D being within the 56 mesh tiles of the bottom die, and 3D being 28 adjacent mesh tiles across both dies. The results show that the Hybrid Bonding Interconnect (HBI) had a negligible impact on efficiency.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Intel found that the 3D mesh reduces latency and increases throughput by almost 40%. They also tested the energy efficiency of transferring data, with 2D being within the 56 mesh tiles of the bottom die, and 3D being 28 adjacent mesh tiles across both dies. The results show that the Hybrid Bonding Interconnect (HBI) had a negligible impact on efficiency.

pro.text: 英特尔发现，3D网格架构能降低延迟，并将吞吐量提升近40%。他们还测试了数据传输的能效，其中2D架构的数据传输发生在底部芯片的56个网格单元内，而3D架构则跨越两个芯片上的28个相邻网格单元。结果显示，其混合键合互连（Hybrid Bonding Interconnect, HBI）对能效的影响微乎其微。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致且略显生硬。原文中“tiles”在同一段落内被译为“单元”，但“mesh tiles”和“DNN accelerator tiles”的翻译未完全统一，且“网格单元”和“核心单元”的表述在中文语境下不够清晰。
译文“通过 Foveros Direct 技术进行键合，这是一种间距为 9 微米的混合键合方案。”略显冗长，且“进行键合”是典型的翻译腔。
译文“SRAM（静态随机存取存储器）在两个芯片之间共享。”存在轻微歧义。原文“shared across both dies”更强调SRAM资源在上下两个芯片（die）构成的整体中是共享的，而非简单的“之间”连接。
译文“能将延迟降低，并将吞吐量提升近40%”中的“能将”和“并将”稍显书面化，可以更直接有力。
术语“HBI”在译文中首次出现时未加注英文全称，且中文翻译“混合键合互连”在上下文中略显突兀，因为前文已多次出现“混合键合”。

译文逻辑关系存在模糊和可能的误译。原文结构是：CWF使用Foveros Direct做某事（disaggregate...），具体方式是（with...）。译文“将 CPU 核心集群的 L2 缓存与基础芯片上的 L3 缓存解耦，每个顶部芯片包含6个集群，每个集群提供 35GB/s 带宽，总计每个顶部芯片为 210GB/s。”将“with”引导的细节（6集群，每集群35GB/s）处理为对“解耦”结果的补充说明，但原文更可能是指“通过（利用）每个顶部芯片上的6个集群（每个35GB/s）来实现与基础L3的解耦”。译文未明确表达出这35GB/s/集群的带宽是用于连接L2和L3的互连带宽，而非L2缓存本身的带宽。
译文“即每个连接在更小的面积上提供了 15.6GB/s 的带宽。”信息准确，但“在更小的面积上”这个比较对象（比什么小？）在中文中稍显突兀，因为前句未明确提及CWF连接的面积。

paragraphs.source: Each tile has 552 pads, with just under half used for data, and just under a quarter used for power.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Each tile has 552 pads, with just under half used for data, and just under a quarter used for power.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Each tile has 552 pads, with just under half used for data, and just under a quarter used for power.

pro.text: 每个单元拥有552个焊盘，其中略少于一半用于数据传输，略少于四分之一用于供电。
